retry_reason: If bus_find fails (device not found), caller may retry later when device appears via probe deferral; if later steps fail (rt_sdca_jack_add_codec_device_props), retry unlikely to succeed without configuration changes.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is initialization of jack detection for a headset codec, not refcount management. The bus_find_device_by_name get and put_device are incidental to the broader logic of finding the device and adding properties.
